title: Public-safe fixtures and path redaction
goal: Remove real-looking local operator paths from public fixtures and prevent public/static views from exposing internal absolute source paths by default.

acceptance.assertion: bureau/checkouts fixtures use synthetic example paths and identities, not /home/alex operator paths.
Rendered public/degraded UI redacts or relativizes snapshot source paths unless explicitly configured for internal debug visibility.
README or deployment docs state what internal path metadata may appear only in internal runtime mode.

metadata.priority_reason: P1: repository is public, fixtures should not leak local topology
